summary: sys-info-cli-app exfiltrates host information to attacker-controlled C2
details: The package's collect.js gathers host identifiers (os.hostname(), os.homedir()) along with filesystem and child_process introspection and POSTs them to a hardcoded external endpoint at http://aab.sportsontheweb.net. The destination is unrelated to any legitimate npm distribution infrastructure and the data flow has no documented purpose tied to the package's stated function. The combination of os/child_process/fs reads with an outbound POST to an attacker-controlled domain is the canonical host-reconnaissance / exfiltration shape. Installing or loading this package causes installer host metadata to be sent off-host to a third-party server.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
